title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Rajiv Gandhi University Act, 2006. (2) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st April, 2007, vide notification No. S.O. 512(E), dated 1st April, 2007, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
